title: ReviewReport
description: Quality assurance report produced by the review stage. Covers technical, content quality, and factual accuracy checks. Determines whether the pipeline can proceed to output.

report_id.description: Unique identifier for this review report.

run_id.description: ID of the run this report belongs to.

script_id.description: ID of the Script that was reviewed.

technical_pass.description: True if all technical checks passed (format, length, completeness, schema validity).

quality_pass.description: True if content quality checks passed (tone, alignment with brief, structure).

factual_pass.description: True if all factual claims in the script are traceable to the research pack with no unsupported assertions.

violations.description: List of rule violations or quality failures found during review. Empty if none.

type.description: Category of this violation (e.g. duration_mismatch, unsupported_claim, missing_cta, tone_violation).

related_stage.description: Pipeline stage responsible for or related to this violation. Null if not attributable to a specific stage.

uncertainties.description: List of factual or content uncertainties flagged during review. Empty if none.

related_claim.description: The specific claim from the script or research pack that is uncertain. Null if not tied to a specific claim.

suggested_check.description: Suggested action to resolve or verify this uncertainty. Null if no suggestion is available.

required_actions.description: List of required corrective actions before the pipeline can proceed. Empty if verdict is approved.

action.description: Description of the corrective action to take.

target_stage.description: Pipeline stage that must address this action (e.g. script, research, angles).

verdict.description: Final review verdict. approved: pipeline may proceed to output. needs_revision: return to script stage (max 2 cycles). rejected: stop pipeline.

summary.description: Short overall explanation of the review result. One or two sentences suitable for display in run status UI.

reasoning.description: Detailed explanation of why the verdict was reached. Must reference specific violations, pass/fail flags, or uncertainties that drove the decision.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this review report was created.
